title: Service Special
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Service Special''' was a small [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] used by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement agency]] [[Police officer/Legends|officers]].

Developed around [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]], the Service Special was only half the size of most blasters but possessed six times the power, and was a secret even from some elements of the Imperial military. Its power was roughly equal to one of the four cannons in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon's'']] [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad-guns]].

Corrupt officer [[Waywa Fybot]] used this weapon to kill [[Bassi Vobah]] during the raid on [[Bohhuah Mutdah/Legends|Bohhuah Mutdah]], literally disintegrating her head.

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Flamewind of Oseon]]'' {{1st}}
